text: This demo uses a fully local generation model with vai. Responses are generated by Ollama running llama3.2:3b, while embeddings are generated locally with voyage-4-nano.

The local setup emphasizes three practical benefits: privacy, zero per-call embedding cost, and easier offline development. MongoDB Atlas stores the vectors so vai can retrieve the right context during chat.

The workflow is simple: ingest a small document set with local embeddings, create a vector search index on the embedding field, start vai chat with Ollama and voyage-4-nano, ask questions about the documents, and exit with slash-quit.
